evals.prompt: 启动 vllm 服务，模型使用 models/Qwen3-0.6B，端口 8000
evals.expected_output: vLLM OpenAI-compatible API server is started on port 8000 for Qwen3-0.6B model
expectations: The agent constructs a docker exec command to run inside the lw_agent container
The command uses the vLLM serve or api_server entrypoint
The agent informs the user that the service is blocking the terminal

evals.prompt: 对 Qwen3-0.6B 进行在线压测，服务地址 http://127.0.0.1:8000，请求速率 10 req/s，共 200 个 prompt
evals.expected_output: vLLM serving benchmark executed against the running server with throughput/latency metrics
expectations: The agent constructs a docker exec command
The command uses vllm bench serve

evals.prompt: 测试 models/Qwen3-0.6B 的性能，端口 8001，请求速率 5 req/s，共 100 个 prompt，input_len 256，output_len 128
evals.expected_output: vLLM server started in background on port 8001, benchmark run, results reported, cleanup offered
expectations: The agent starts the server in background (nohup, &, or docker exec -d)
The agent waits for server readiness (polls /v1/models endpoint)
The agent asks about stopping the server after benchmark
